response.overview: A boy living in constant black and white finds a coloured flower whilst embarking on his walk. Upon picking the flower, his world gains diversity and colour, but how long will this phenomenon last?
response.tagline: A boy living in constant black and white finds a coloured flower whilst embarking on his walk. Upon picking the flower, his world gains diversity and colour, but how long will this phenomenon last?
response.title: EVANESCENT
